mapper.select: SELECT i.`id`, i.`name`, i.`description`, i.`image`, SUM(ui.`count`) AS count FROM `swish`.`item_user` ui JOIN `swish`.`item` i ON ui.`item_id` = i.`id` WHERE ui.`user_id` = #{userId} GROUP BY i.`id`, i.`name`, i.`description`, i.`image`

SELECT i.`id`, i.`name`, i.`description`, i.`image`, COALESCE(SUM(ui.`count`), 0) AS count FROM `swish`.`item` i LEFT JOIN `swish`.`item_user` ui ON i.`id` = ui.`item_id` AND ui.`user_id` = #{userId} GROUP BY i.`id`, i.`name`, i.`description`, i.`image`
